name: Django Ninja
description: Django Ninja — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in API Framework.

seo.title: Django Ninja Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Django Ninja analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Best for automated build/test/deploy pipelines. Django Ninja offers custom pricing.
pros: Faster time-to-market vs. building from scratch
cons: Limited customization for complex business logic
